groups.name: Property Leases
groups.note: This is an intake system to initially review leases or subleases prior to submitting to legal.

groups.name: Software Development Vendor Intake
groups.note: This is the preferred method to sign up new or additional work from a software or other IP producing vendor.  You will upload proposed forms from the vendor and existing vendor contract and answer a few questions.  If they are willing to use our form

groups.name: Contingent Bad Debt Collection Intake (not disputes)
groups.name_last: Contingent Bad Debt Collection Intake (not disputes)
groups.note: Use this intake to assign invoices for collection.  This is not for disputed contract matters, but rather for items that would normally be sent for collections.

groups.name: Customer or Vendor MUTUAL NDA
groups.note: This is for any normal (NOT M&A) business NDA where we will be disclosing and receiving confidential information.

groups.name: Disputes (other than contingent collections)
groups.note: This will gather documents and background on disputes.

groups.name: Internal Use Enterprise Software
groups.note:
NOT STUDENT USE SOFTWARE & NOT OEM

This is for internal use software licensing.  Do not use this for student or timeback licensing, do not use this for software that made available for use by customers.  Do not use for open source.

groups.name: Law and Accounting Firm Engagements
groups.note: Use this for hiring law firms and CPA firms.  These forms are regulated to a large extent, so this portal is tailored for them.

groups.name: M&A Low Touch BUY SIDE NDA Submission
groups.name_last: M&A Low Touch BUY SIDE NDA Submission
groups.note: This is ONLY for buy side, low touch NDAs.  Use another portal or Jira for regular NDAs (e.g. where we are selling companies or selling products or services).

groups.name: Non-Strategic and Non-Software Vendor Intake
groups.note:
Purpose
Use this app to review contracts related to routine services such as school maintenance, landscaping, pest control, and similar vendors.  Design consultants like architects ARE NOT TO BE SUBMITTED HERE.  Use the strategic vendor intake.

How

groups.name: Reseller and OEM Intake
groups.note: Use this to submit a reseller agreement or OEM agreement for review.

groups.name: SaaS Renewals/New Deals
groups.note: Use this for any sales side SaaS deal.

groups.name: Strategic Short Term Consulting Agreements (non-dev, not law or CPA firm)
groups.name_last: Strategic Short Term Consulting Agreements (non-dev, not law or CPA firm)
groups.note: This is for a project based consulting arrangement - architect, compliance audit, etc.  Use other portals for dev, CPA, Law Firm.  Consult HR if you are bringing I a long term management consultant.

groups.name: Student Use Software and Content Licenses (Including TimeBack)
groups.name_last: Student Use Software and Content Licenses (Including TimeBack)
groups.note: This intake is for the licensing of software for Alpha or other school related entities.
